name: academia-track
description: Academic Application Tracker - Track universities, programs, deadlines, and submissions
author: BHARATH CHANDRA VADDARAM <bharath.vbcr@gmail.com>

scripts.map:status: npm run gitnexus:status && npm run map:verify
scripts.map:refresh: npm run gitnexus:analyze && npm run graphify:hook-status && npm run map:verify
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:electron
scripts.legacy:electron:start: wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run legacy:electron:build-main && electron .
scripts.legacy:electron:build: npm run build && npm run legacy:electron:build-main && electron-builder
scripts.build:main: node -e "console.warn('DEPRECATED: use npm run legacy:electron:build-main for the old Electron main build; Tauri is the primary desktop runtime.')" && npm run legacy:electron:build-main
scripts.dev:electron: node -e "console.warn('DEPRECATED: use npm run dev:tauri or npm run dev:desktop. Electron is legacy-only.')" && npm run legacy:electron:dev
scripts.start:electron: node -e "console.warn('DEPRECATED: use npm run dev:tauri or npm run dev:desktop. Electron is legacy-only.')" && npm run legacy:electron:start
scripts.build:electron: node -e "console.warn('DEPRECATED: use npm run build:tauri or npm run build:desktop. Electron is legacy-only.')" && npm run legacy:electron:build
scripts.package:electron: node -e "console.warn('DEPRECATED: use npm run package. Electron is legacy-only.')" && npm run legacy:electron:package
